nominated.citation: For exceptionally meritorious conduct in the performance of outstanding services and achievements as ODA-5211 Team Sergeant from January 2021 to present. SFC Guerrero's leadership and tactical expertise directly contributed to 14 successful foreign internal defense missions and three partner nation force-on-force exercises in support of CENTCOM objectives.
nominated.for: Accumulated actions during the period 01 Jan 2021 – 31 Dec 2025

submitted.citation: For exceptionally meritorious service as ODA-5221 Team Sergeant from July 2020 to present, distinguished by superior operational planning and execution during multiple counter-narco-terrorism operations and partner nation advisory missions throughout CENTCOM.
submitted.currentStatus: Submitted — Group awaiting final Group CDR signature

nominated.citation: For exceptionally meritorious service as Alpha Company Commander, 2nd Battalion, Demo Battalion from June 2023 to present. CPT Thompson led three operational deployments and unified the company to achieve the highest readiness rating in the battalion history.

submitted.citation: For exceptionally meritorious service as Communications Sergeant, ODA-5213, from July 2023 to present. SSG Chen's expertise in SATCOM, wideband communications, and multi-echelon integration directly enabled every ODA-5213 operational mission and maintained zero communications downtime during three consecutive overseas deployments.
submitted.currentStatus: Submitted — BN CDR endorsed; awaiting Group CDR signature

submitted.citation: For meritorious service as Medical Section NCOIC, Support Company, 2nd Battalion, Demo Battalion from April 2024 to April 2026. SFC Moreno managed battalion medical readiness at 92% MRC Class 1/2, coordinating 47 SRP events and ensuring 100% medical records compliance prior to three operational deployments.
submitted.currentStatus: Submitted — awaiting BN CDR signature; in S1 queue

nominated.citation: For exceptionally meritorious service as Battalion S8, 2nd Battalion, Demo Battalion from October 2023 to October 2026. MAJ Navarro achieved zero pay errors across 307 soldiers over 36 months, resolved 14 DFAS discrepancies, and managed over $1.2M in GPC expenditures with 100% compliance.
nominated.currentStatus: Nominated — EOT award; CDR reviewing draft

submitted.citation: For meritorious actions in direct support of combat operations during Operation Enduring Freedom – Afghanistan Remnants from March 2025 to August 2025. SFC Reyes displayed exceptional tactical proficiency and personal valor during four direct action missions, neutralizing imminent threats to partner forces and US Special Operations personnel.
submitted.currentStatus: Submitted — Group CDR signed; in PERSCOM queue

nominated.citation: For exceptionally meritorious service as Support Company First Sergeant, 2nd Battalion, Demo Battalion from June 2022 to June 2027. MSG Ingram rebuilt Support Company readiness from 74% to 97% Class 1/2 deployable, overhauled battalion property accountability, and mentored 14 NCOs selected for promotion ahead of peers.
nominated.currentStatus: Nominated — routing through CDR for endorsement
